trivia_bullets.text: On Theros, harpies are 'shrieking buzzards of the badlands' who prefer to steal and harass, filling their aeries with stolen objects they have no use for. Flavor text: 'Desecrating the dead is a convenient way for harpies to expand their foul collections.' Harpies are one of the creature types that can pass into the Underworld, making them a natural fit for THB's underworld focus.
sources: WebSearch snippet: Planeswalker's Guide to Theros Part 3 / MTG Wiki: Underworld

trivia_bullets.text: Scavenging Harpy is a 2/1 Flying creature for {2}{B} whose ETB effect exiles a card from an opponent's graveyard — mechanically countering the set's Escape mechanic (which requires exiling cards from the graveyard). Hipsters of the Coast rated it B, noting its exile upside as directly relevant against Escape strategies.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Every Common in Theros Beyond Death Reviewed

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank: 28,926 — among the lower-played THB commons in Commander, consistent with its role as a narrow meta-specific hoser rather than a general-value creature.
